title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Kale Consultants South Asia Partners in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kale Consultants South Asia Partners:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants South Asia Partners!
